subcodes.first_line: O dearly beloved friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! From the Most Great Prison, despite the malice of Mine enemies, through divine confirmations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عزیز عبدالبهاء از سجن اعظم رغما لانف اولی البغضاء بتاییدات الهیه و
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
